STEP	ci.yml	checks	0		npm run lint
CHECK	ci.yml/checks/step1
SKIP	ci.yml	checks	secrets	references secrets
SKIP	ci.yml	checks	interpolation	run: contains ${{ }} expression
SKIP	ci.yml	checks	step-if	step-level if: (github.event_name == 'push')
STEP	ci.yml	checks	0		npm run format:check
CHECK	ci.yml/checks/step5
SUMMARY	mirrored=2	skipped=3
